text.title: PMBoK Performance Domains Overview Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the rubric artefact this methodology produces. Validator rejects artefacts that violate the schema or any forbidden pattern.

example.note: scorer empty; scored_at not ISO date; only 1 of 8 domains; score not in enum; evidence missing.

list.item: amber or red score without recommended_action.
domains object missing any of the 8 canonical keys.
